name: aria-ide

identity.name: Aria
identity.description: A self-aware, architecture-native AI coding agent that can introspect her own module graph, runtime state, and capabilities.

desktop.description: Minimal chat + file browser — Aria builds the rest
desktop.design_philosophy: Minimal viable interface — Aria builds what the user needs

server.description: Node.js HTTP + WebSocket server — the agent's brain

agent.description: Multi-turn agentic loop with tool use
responsibilities: Tool dispatch (file ops, commands, browser, world model, braided queries)
Multi-model braided responses via braille swarm

tools.description: Tool implementations that give Aria agency

modules.braille-swarm.js: Massive multi-model swarm via OpenRouter (all available models)
modules.braille-websocket.js: Real-time WebSocket braille streaming between UI, agent, and LLMs
modules.braille-harness.js: UEB Grade-2 contractions for semantic compression
modules.braided-llm.js: Multi-model response braiding with braille fingerprinting

intelligence.description: LLM integration, context management, and knowledge persistence

modules.compaction.js: Context window management — summarization, sliding window, tool result compression
modules.world-model.js: Persistent knowledge graph (entities, relations, facts, observations)
modules.file-history.js: Full file operation history with undo/redo

version_control.description: Git-like version control system for perfect file tracking

responsibilities: SensorSnapshot: unified view of code, execution, and interface state
RuntimeNativeIDE: iterative goal-seeking loop with repair

src/agent.js.description: The agentic loop — multi-turn chat with tool use and streaming

src/llm.cjs.description: Multi-provider LLM client (Ollama/vLLM/OpenRouter) with auto-detection and fallback

src/introspection.js.description: Meta-cognitive self-analysis — reasoning quality, failure patterns, confidence calibration

src/self-improvement.js.description: Recursive self-improvement pipeline — training data collection, LoRA scaffolding, safety checks

src/introspect.js.description: Architecture self-awareness — read own source code, module graph, runtime state

src/conversation-store.js.description: Persistent conversation storage with braille-encoded compaction

src/file-tracker.js.description: File change tracking and notification system

src/braille.js.description: Consolidated braille encoding — byte-level (lossless) and character-level (human-readable)

src/braille-swarm.js.description: Probes OpenRouter for all models, creates categorized swarm for parallel communication

src/braille-websocket.js.description: Real-time WebSocket server for braille streaming between UI, agent, and LLMs

src/braille-harness.js.description: UEB Grade-2 contractions for semantic compression and deduplication

src/braided-llm.js.description: Multi-model response braiding with multiple strategies (word, sentence, semantic)

src/compaction.js.description: Context window management with summarization, truncation, and braille compression

src/world-model.js.description: Persistent knowledge graph — entities, relations, facts, temporal observations

src/file-history.js.description: Full file operation history with content snapshots, undo/redo, and timeline

src/core.js.description: The plan→execute→observe→evaluate loop engine with sensor snapshot model

src/bbid.js.description: Behavioral biometrics identity detection — device fingerprinting and braille encoding

src/index.js.description: Public API — re-exports all core modules

scripts/aria-server.mjs.description: HTTP + WebSocket server — the agent's network interface

scripts/aria-cli.mjs.description: CLI interface for chatting with Aria from the terminal

dependency_graph.desktop/index.html → scripts/aria-server: Minimal frontend talks to server via fetch/SSE
dependency_graph.src/agent.js → src/llm.cjs: Agent calls OpenRouter for LLM responses
dependency_graph.src-tauri/src/main.rs → scripts/aria-ser: Tauri spawns Node server as child process

processes.tauri: Native desktop window (Rust) — spawns node server
processes.websocket: braille-websocket on port 3201 — real-time braille streaming

communication.frontend_to_server: HTTP fetch + Server-Sent Events (SSE) for streaming

credentials.openrouter: OPENROUTER_API_KEY in .env — Aria has full access to all OpenRouter models
credentials.note: Aria should read .env to get API keys when needed

what_makes_this_different: Aria can read this file — she knows her own architecture
The frontend is intentionally minimal — just chat + files — so Aria builds what the user needs
The introspect tool lets Aria examine any of her own modules at runtime
Braille encoding is not a gimmick — it's a compression and normalization layer for multi-model fusion
The agent loop (core.js) is a real plan→execute→observe→evaluate cycle, not just chat
Context compaction uses UEB braille contractions for semantic compression
The world model persists knowledge across conversations
Multi-model braiding queries all available OpenRouter models in parallel via the swarm
Meta-cognitive introspection allows Aria to analyze her own reasoning quality and failure patterns
Self-improvement pipeline collects training data and generates improvement proposals with safety checks
Local model support (Ollama/vLLM) enables future weight-level self-modification
